title: Zero-Carbon Shipping Economics and Management
description: This course constructs a "technology - economy - policy - management" four - in - one theoretical system for a systematic study of this field. On the one hand, it deeply analyzes the basic theories such as the concept, types, characteristics, and system management of zero - carbon shipping, allowing students to comprehensively understand the framework of zero - carbon shipping. On the other hand, it focuses on cutting - edge fields such as the carbon trading market, the selection of green fuels, and ship emission reduction technologies. Through multi - dimensional analysis, cost - benefit assessment and other methods, it provides students with practical decision - making ideas.
